function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_i2c_transfer.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_i2c_transfer
description: >
  Verifies all three I2C instances (I2C0, I2C1, I2C2) of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  I2C2 is the derivative-added instance (R-006). Tests cover 7-bit address
  write/read transactions on all instances, 10-bit address mode on I2C0,
  fast-mode (400 kHz) and fast-plus-mode (1 MHz) on I2C0, and register
  smoke test across all three instances. Each instance uses an independent
  I2C slave memory model.
checklist_ids:
  - I2C-01
  - I2C-02
  - I2C-03
  - I2C-04
  - I2C-05
  - I2C-06
  - I2C-07
  - I2C-08
test_names:
  - test_i2c0_7bit_write
  - test_i2c0_7bit_read
  - test_i2c1_transfer
  - test_i2c2_transfer
  - test_i2c0_10bit_addr
  - test_i2c0_fast_mode
  - test_i2c0_fast_plus
  - test_i2c_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: i2c1_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c1_sda
      scl: i2c1_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x51
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: i2c2_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c2_sda
      scl: i2c2_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x52
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all I2C instances idle
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure I2C0 at 100 kHz, 7-bit addressing
  - step: 3
    action: i2c_master_write
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x00
    data: 0xAB
    description: I2C0 7-bit write 0xAB to slave register 0x00; verify ACK
  - step: 4
    action: i2c_master_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x00
    expected: 0xAB
    description: I2C0 7-bit read from slave register 0x00; verify data
  - step: 5
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C1
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure I2C1 at 100 kHz, 7-bit addressing
  - step: 6
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C1
    slave_addr: 0x51
    reg_addr: 0x10
    write_data: 0xCD
    description: I2C1 write and read-back test
  - step: 7
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C2
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure derivative I2C2 instance at 100 kHz
  - step: 8
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C2
    slave_addr: 0x52
    reg_addr: 0x20
    write_data: 0xEF
    description: I2C2 (new derivative instance) write and read-back test
  - step: 9
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 10bit
    description: Reconfigure I2C0 for 10-bit addressing
  - step: 10
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x150
    reg_addr: 0x00
    write_data: 0x99
    description: I2C0 10-bit address write/read
  - step: 11
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: fast_400kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Switch I2C0 to fast-mode 400 kHz
  - step: 12
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x05
    write_data: 0x11
    description: Fast-mode transaction at 400 kHz
  - step: 13
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: fast_plus_1MHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Switch I2C0 to fast-plus mode 1 MHz
  - step: 14
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x06
    write_data: 0x22
    description: Fast-plus-mode transaction at 1 MHz
  - step: 15
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [I2C0, I2C1, I2C2]
    description: Read all I2C CSRs; verify reset-value defaults for all three instances

checks:
  - id: CHK-I2C-01
    checklist_id: I2C-01
    description: I2C0 7-bit write 0xAB to slave ACKed; slave registers value
    expected: I2C0 STATUS.BUSY clears; no NACK; slave contains 0xAB at reg 0x00
  - id: CHK-I2C-02
    checklist_id: I2C-02
    description: I2C0 7-bit read from slave returns 0xAB
    expected: RXDATA == 0xAB
  - id: CHK-I2C-03
    checklist_id: I2C-03
    description: I2C1 write/read cycle completes correctly
    expected: Written value read back from I2C1 slave
  - id: CHK-I2C-04
    checklist_id: I2C-04
    description: I2C2 (derivative new instance) write/read cycle completes correctly
    expected: Written value read back from I2C2 slave; NACK not observed
  - id: CHK-I2C-05
    checklist_id: I2C-05
    description: I2C0 10-bit address transaction ACKed; data verified
    expected: 10-bit slave at 0x150 responds; data matches
  - id: CHK-I2C-06
    checklist_id: I2C-06
    description: I2C0 400 kHz fast-mode transaction completes without errors
    expected: Transfer completes; no timeout; slave ACKs
  - id: CHK-I2C-07
    checklist_id: I2C-07
    description: I2C0 1 MHz fast-plus-mode transaction completes without errors
    expected: Transfer completes; no timeout; slave ACKs
  - id: CHK-I2C-08
    checklist_id: I2C-08
    description: All I2C CSRs across I2C0, I2C1, I2C2 read expected reset defaults
    expected: No unexpected values; no APB errors

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-I2C checks PASS
  - I2C slave models report no protocol violations
  - I2C2 (derivative instance) behaves identically to I2C0/I2C1
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

extras.new_content:
scenario_name: scenario_i2c_transfer
description: >
  Verifies all three I2C instances (I2C0, I2C1, I2C2) of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  I2C2 is the derivative-added instance (R-006). Tests cover 7-bit address
  write/read transactions on all instances, 10-bit address mode on I2C0,
  fast-mode (400 kHz) and fast-plus-mode (1 MHz) on I2C0, and register
  smoke test across all three instances. Each instance uses an independent
  I2C slave memory model.
checklist_ids:
  - I2C-01
  - I2C-02
  - I2C-03
  - I2C-04
  - I2C-05
  - I2C-06
  - I2C-07
  - I2C-08
test_names:
  - test_i2c0_7bit_write
  - test_i2c0_7bit_read
  - test_i2c1_transfer
  - test_i2c2_transfer
  - test_i2c0_10bit_addr
  - test_i2c0_fast_mode
  - test_i2c0_fast_plus
  - test_i2c_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: i2c_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c0_sda
      scl: i2c0_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x50
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: i2c1_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c1_sda
      scl: i2c1_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x51
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000
  - name: i2c2_slave_model
    type: i2c_memory
    connect:
      sda: i2c2_sda
      scl: i2c2_scl
    params:
      address_7bit: 0x52
      mem_size_bytes: 256
      speed_hz: 100000

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; all I2C instances idle
  - step: 2
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure I2C0 at 100 kHz, 7-bit addressing
  - step: 3
    action: i2c_master_write
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x00
    data: 0xAB
    description: I2C0 7-bit write 0xAB to slave register 0x00; verify ACK
  - step: 4
    action: i2c_master_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x00
    expected: 0xAB
    description: I2C0 7-bit read from slave register 0x00; verify data
  - step: 5
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C1
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure I2C1 at 100 kHz, 7-bit addressing
  - step: 6
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C1
    slave_addr: 0x51
    reg_addr: 0x10
    write_data: 0xCD
    description: I2C1 write and read-back test
  - step: 7
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C2
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Configure derivative I2C2 instance at 100 kHz
  - step: 8
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C2
    slave_addr: 0x52
    reg_addr: 0x20
    write_data: 0xEF
    description: I2C2 (new derivative instance) write and read-back test
  - step: 9
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: standard_100kHz
    addr_mode: 10bit
    description: Reconfigure I2C0 for 10-bit addressing
  - step: 10
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x150
    reg_addr: 0x00
    write_data: 0x99
    description: I2C0 10-bit address write/read
  - step: 11
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: fast_400kHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Switch I2C0 to fast-mode 400 kHz
  - step: 12
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x05
    write_data: 0x11
    description: Fast-mode transaction at 400 kHz
  - step: 13
    action: apb_configure_i2c
    instance: I2C0
    mode: fast_plus_1MHz
    addr_mode: 7bit
    description: Switch I2C0 to fast-plus mode 1 MHz
  - step: 14
    action: i2c_master_write_read
    instance: I2C0
    slave_addr: 0x50
    reg_addr: 0x06
    write_data: 0x22
    description: Fast-plus-mode transaction at 1 MHz
  - step: 15
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [I2C0, I2C1, I2C2]
    description: Read all I2C CSRs; verify reset-value defaults for all three instances

checks:
  - id: CHK-I2C-01
    checklist_id: I2C-01
    description: I2C0 7-bit write 0xAB to slave ACKed; slave registers value
    expected: I2C0 STATUS.BUSY clears; no NACK; slave contains 0xAB at reg 0x00
  - id: CHK-I2C-02
    checklist_id: I2C-02
    description: I2C0 7-bit read from slave returns 0xAB
    expected: RXDATA == 0xAB
  - id: CHK-I2C-03
    checklist_id: I2C-03
    description: I2C1 write/read cycle completes correctly
    expected: Written value read back from I2C1 slave
  - id: CHK-I2C-04
    checklist_id: I2C-04
    description: I2C2 (derivative new instance) write/read cycle completes correctly
    expected: Written value read back from I2C2 slave; NACK not observed
  - id: CHK-I2C-05
    checklist_id: I2C-05
    description: I2C0 10-bit address transaction ACKed; data verified
    expected: 10-bit slave at 0x150 responds; data matches
  - id: CHK-I2C-06
    checklist_id: I2C-06
    description: I2C0 400 kHz fast-mode transaction completes without errors
    expected: Transfer completes; no timeout; slave ACKs
  - id: CHK-I2C-07
    checklist_id: I2C-07
    description: I2C0 1 MHz fast-plus-mode transaction completes without errors
    expected: Transfer completes; no timeout; slave ACKs
  - id: CHK-I2C-08
    checklist_id: I2C-08
    description: All I2C CSRs across I2C0, I2C1, I2C2 read expected reset defaults
    expected: No unexpected values; no APB errors

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-I2C checks PASS
  - I2C slave models report no protocol violations
  - I2C2 (derivative instance) behaves identically to I2C0/I2C1
